title: Disc Backport
description: Adds discs from future versions into the earlier versions.
body: This mod adds all discs added after the version you download for into the game. This is a great mod for any music disc lovers that want the 1.21 music discs but are bound to 1.20.1 due to the semi-discontinuation of forge modloader. Later versions will be realeased for 1.19 and 1.18, but currently only 1.20.1 in supported, as I am working on a massive update for my main mod, More Discs (This will be coming to Modrinth when the update is done, beta version on Curseforge). This mod is basically vanilla and is a great addon to your modpacks without making the game feel overly-modded.
